productDisplayName: Timex Men White Dial Watch T2M707
description: Article number: T2M707Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, has a rotating bezel with markings and a stainless steel backDial style: White dial with black accent, has black markings, black hour and minute hands with white inlays, black seconds hand and branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: A screw to reset the time, date aperture near the 4 hour mark, three-faced chronograph, two press buttons control the chronographStrap style: Steel toned and black, metal, bracelet style strap with a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase against any manufacturing defect
